simplesect.para: the window this view is shown in.
the document this view is showing.

detaileddescription.para: Reset the view to show document.

simplesect.para: True if the current view is visible, False if not.
the canvas this view is showing. The canvas controls things like zoom and rotation.

briefdescription.para: activateResource activates the given resource.

parameterdescription.para: a pattern, gradient or paintop preset

briefdescription.para: backgroundColor allows access to the currently active background color. This is nominally per canvas/view, but in practice per mainwindow.
return the current selected preset
set the current selected preset

parameterdescription.para: the current preset to set (Resource type = 'preset')

briefdescription.para: return the current selected pattern
set the current selected pattern

parameterdescription.para: the current pattern to set (Resource type = 'pattern')

briefdescription.para: return the current selected gradient
set the current selected gradient

parameterdescription.para: the current gradient to set (Resource type = 'gradient')

briefdescription.para: return the current blending mode for brush
set the current blending mode for brush

parameterdescription.para: the current belding mode identifier

briefdescription.para: set the current HDR Exposure value

parameterdescription.para: the HDR Exposure to set

briefdescription.para: set the current HDR Gamma value

parameterdescription.para: the HDR Gamma to set

briefdescription.para: return the current opacity for brush

simplesect.para: the brush opacity value (0.00=fully transparent - 1.00=fully opaque)

briefdescription.para: set the current opacity for brush

parameterdescription.para: the opacity value (0.00=fully transparent - 1.00=fully opaque)

briefdescription.para: return the current size for brush
set the current size for brush

parameterdescription.para: the brush size (in pixels)

briefdescription.para: return the current fade for brush
set the current fade for brush

parameterdescription.para: the brush fade (0.00 - 1.00)

briefdescription.para: return the current rotation for brush tip

simplesect.para: the brush tip rotation value (in degrees)

briefdescription.para: set the current rotation for brush tip

parameterdescription.para: the brush tip rotation (in degrees)

briefdescription.para: return the current flow for brush
set the current flow value for brush

parameterdescription.para: the brush flow

briefdescription.para: return the current pattern size for brush
set the current pattern size value for brush

parameterdescription.para: the brush pattern size

briefdescription.para: return current eraser mode status (active/inactive)

simplesect.para: True if eraser mode is active, otherwise False

briefdescription.para: set current eraser active/inactive

parameterdescription.para: Set to True to activate eraser mode, False to deactivate

briefdescription.para: return current global alpha lock mode (active/inactive)

simplesect.para: True if is active, otherwise False

briefdescription.para: set current global alpha lock mode active/inactive

parameterdescription.para: Set to True to lock global alpha mode, False to unlock

briefdescription.para: return current disabled pressure status

simplesect.para: True if is pressure is disabled, otherwise False

briefdescription.para: set current disabled pressure status

parameterdescription.para: Set to True to disable pressure, False to enabled pressure

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString &message, const QIcon &icon, int timeout, int priority)
memberdef.name: showFloatingMessage

briefdescription.para: showFloatingMessage displays a floating message box on the top-left corner of the canvas

parameterdescription.para: Message to be displayed inside the floating message box
Icon to be displayed inside the message box next to the message string
Milliseconds until the message box disappears
0 = High, 1 = Medium, 2 = Low. Higher priority messages will be displayed in place of lower priority messages

para.verbatim: @brief selectedNodes returns a list of Nodes that are selected in this view.

simplesect.para: a list of Node objects which may be empty.

briefdescription.para: flakeToDocumentTransform The transformation of the document relative to the view without rotation and mirroring
flakeToCanvasTransform The transformation of the canvas relative to the view without rotation and mirroring
flakeToImageTransform The transformation of the image relative to the view without rotation and mirroring

detaileddescription.para: View represents one view on a document. A document can be shown in more than one view at a time.
